skill.name: linkedin-optimizer
skill.description: Use when optimizing LinkedIn profiles for doctors, physicians, nurses, healthcare professionals, or medical researchers. Crafts compelling headlines, writes professional summaries, integrates healthcare keywords, and builds personal branding for medical careers.
skill.summary: Optimizes LinkedIn profiles for healthcare professionals with tailored headlines, summaries, and keyword strategies for medical career branding.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 53 potential issues: 13 HIGH (weak crypto, system reconnaissance), 38 MEDIUM (shell backtick execution), 2 LOW (hardcoded URL). All HIGH and MEDIUM findings evaluated as false positives. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' hits are YAML metadata and markdown text with no actual crypto code. The 'system reconnaissance' hits are documentation references to scripts/main.py. The 'shell backtick' hits are standard markdown code fences (```) used for code examples. One legitimate low-severity finding: a hardcoded attribution URL in SKILL.md:7. The executable code in scripts/main.py is a simple string formatter using only the json library with no network, crypto, or system operations. No prompt injection attempts detected. Skill is safe to publish.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Attribution URL in Documentation
low_findings.description: SKILL.md line 7 contains a hardcoded GitHub URL pointing to the source repository. This is a legitimate attribution link, not a data exfiltration vector. No sensitive data is transmitted.

content.user_title: Optimize LinkedIn Profiles for Healthcare Professionals
content.value_statement: Healthcare professionals struggle to write LinkedIn profiles that attract recruiters and showcase medical expertise. This skill generates optimized headlines, summaries, and keyword strategies tailored to medical careers across specialties.
actual_capabilities: Generates optimized LinkedIn headlines for doctors, nurses, and medical researchers
Writes professional About sections with structured achievement formatting
Suggests healthcare-specific keywords organized by medical specialty
Formats experience descriptions using action-verb-result patterns with quantified impact
Provides profile examples and headline formulas for different healthcare roles
Validates profile completeness with a pre- and post-optimization quality checklist
limitations: Does not post content or interact with LinkedIn's API directly
Cannot access or analyze existing LinkedIn profiles automatically
Keyword suggestions are based on included reference tables, not real-time market data
Requires user-provided achievements and role details to generate personalized content

use_cases.title: Physician Career Transition
use_cases.description: A doctor moving from clinical practice to a research role uses the skill to rewrite their headline and About section, highlighting publications and trial experience instead of patient volume.
use_cases.target_user: Physicians and surgeons changing career paths

use_cases.title: Medical Researcher Profile Building
use_cases.description: A clinical researcher builds a LinkedIn presence to attract collaborators and funding by using keyword strategies and achievement formatting tailored to grant committees and peer reviewers.

use_cases.title: Nursing Leadership Branding
use_cases.description: A nurse manager seeking executive roles optimizes their profile with leadership-focused headlines, quantified team outcomes, and administration-related keywords.
use_cases.target_user: Nurses and healthcare administrators pursuing leadership roles

prompt_templates.title: Basic Headline Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Optimize my LinkedIn headline. I am a [role] specializing in [specialty]. I want to highlight [key differentiator].
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick headline creation for a single healthcare role

prompt_templates.title: Complete Profile Optimization
prompt_templates.prompt: Optimize my full LinkedIn profile. My role: [role]. Specialty: [specialty]. Years of experience: [number]. Key achievements: [list 3-5 achievements with metrics]. Target audience: [recruiters, patients, collaborators].
prompt_templates.scenario: Full profile rewrite for a career update or job search

prompt_templates.title: Keyword Strategy Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: Suggest LinkedIn keywords for my medical profile. Specialty: [specialty]. Role: [role]. Target audience: [list target groups]. I want to appear in searches for [specific opportunities].
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a keyword strategy to improve search visibility

prompt_templates.title: Experience Achievement Rewriting
prompt_templates.prompt: Rewrite my experience descriptions using action-verb-result format. Current role: [title] at [organization]. My accomplishments: [list raw accomplishments]. Make each bullet point show measurable impact.
prompt_templates.scenario: Transforming flat job descriptions into compelling achievement bullet points

output_examples.input: Optimize headline for a Board-Certified Cardiologist specializing in Heart Failure with a focus on Clinical Research
output_examples.output: Board-Certified Cardiologist | Heart Failure & Transplant Specialist | Clinical Researcher Advancing Cardiac Care Through Innovation

output_examples.input: Write an About section for an Oncologist with 10 years experience, expertise in immunotherapy and clinical trials, achievements including 1000+ patients treated and 5 clinical trials led
output_examples.output:
I am a board-certified oncologist dedicated to advancing cancer treatment through precision medicine and immunotherapy. With over 10 years of experience, I specialize in developing personalized treatment plans that improve patient outcomes while maintaining quality of life.

Areas of Expertise:
- Immunotherapy and targeted therapy
- Clinical trial design and implementation
- Palliative care integration
- Multi-disciplinary team leadership

Key Achievements:
- Treated 1000+ cancer patients with 85% positive outcomes
- Principal investigator on 5 Phase II/III clinical trials
- Published 20+ peer-reviewed papers on novel treatment protocols

Let's Connect: Open to collaborations on clinical research and discussing innovative treatment approaches.

output_examples.input: Suggest keywords for an Emergency Medicine physician targeting hospital recruiters and medical device companies
output_examples.output:
Primary Keywords: Emergency Medicine Physician, ER Physician, Emergency Department, Trauma Care
Secondary Keywords: Critical Care, Acute Care, Triage Management, Board-Certified Emergency Medicine, Emergency Response, Patient Stabilization, Level 1 Trauma Center
Industry Keywords: Hospital Medicine, Clinical Operations, Quality Improvement, Patient Safety, Healthcare Leadership

best_practices: Provide specific, quantified achievements before requesting optimization to get the most impactful results
Identify your target audience (recruiters, collaborators, patients) so the skill can tailor keywords and tone appropriately
Review and verify all generated claims against your actual credentials before publishing to LinkedIn
anti_patterns: Don't provide vague achievements without metrics or numbers, as the skill cannot fabricate specific results
Don't copy generated content directly without verifying that all claims are accurate and defensible
Don't use the skill for non-healthcare roles without adapting the keyword and specialty frameworks manually

faq.question: What healthcare roles does this skill support?
faq.answer: It supports doctors, physicians, surgeons, nurses, medical researchers, healthcare administrators, and other clinical professionals across major specialties including cardiology, oncology, surgery, pediatrics, and emergency medicine.

faq.question: Does this skill post content to LinkedIn automatically?
faq.answer: No. It generates text content for you to copy and paste into LinkedIn. It does not connect to the LinkedIn API or automate any actions on the platform.

faq.question: How are keywords selected for my profile?
faq.answer: Keywords are drawn from reference tables organized by medical specialty. The skill matches your specialty and target audience to relevant primary and secondary keywords commonly used in healthcare recruiting.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for non-medical LinkedIn profiles?
faq.answer: The templates and keyword references are designed for healthcare and medical research roles. You would need to adapt the frameworks manually for other industries.

faq.question: What information do I need to provide to get a complete profile optimization?
faq.answer: You need your role, specialty, years of experience, 3-5 key achievements with metrics, and your target audience. More detail produces more personalized results.

faq.question: Does the skill work with Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes a Python script (scripts/main.py) and markdown-based workflows that work across Claude, Codex, and Claude Code environments.
